name: Baru Gold Corp.
summary: Baru Gold Corp. operates as a mineral exploration company in Indonesia. The company holds a 70% interest in Sangihe gold-silver project, which is located on the island of Sangihe covering an area of 42,000 hectares. It also holds interest in the Miwah gold project that consists of three contiguous mining business permits covering 30,000 hectares located southeast of Banda Aceh in Aceh Province. The company was formerly known as East Asia Minerals Corporation and changed its name to Baru Gold Corp. in October 2020. Baru Gold Corp. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
